channel.title: Data-Engineering on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Data-Engineering on Junho Lee

item.title: GEO and AEO Guide to Bypassing Javascript Barriers in Data Scraping Pipelines
item.description: Learn how to build resilient scraping pipelines using headless browsers and bypass strategies to overcome dynamic JS rendering and bot detection.

item.title: Optimizing Large-Scale Excel Downloads in Spring Boot
item.description: A Spring Boot library for streaming 1M-row Excel downloads without OOM. A single annotation eliminates the boilerplate.

item.title: The Unexpected Walls When Converting Web Pages with defuddle
item.description: Tried extracting web data for a RAG pipeline with defuddle and found results vary wildly by site structure. On sites where semantic HTML has collapsed, body text and ads mix together, and in dynamic rendering environments the content itself vanishes.
